title: Electronic mailing list - Businesses - Tax information newsletter - Canada.ca
content:
## Electronic mailing list - Businesses - Tax information newsletter
When you subscribe to this electronic mailing list, we'll notify you by email when we post new or updated information for businesses to our website such as news, tips, local events, and more.
To see previous issues, go to Businesses - Tax information newsletters .

## Thank you for your help!
You will not receive a reply. For enquiries, contact us .
